events.name: dust_storm
events.description: A massive dust storm engulfs the colony for weeks.

events.name: resource_strike
events.description: A rich vein of iron oxide uncovered during excavation.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: New hydroponics technique doubles crop yield per unit water.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

diaries.text:
**Zeph Wind** (air/trickster) — Year 68

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.
We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.

*— Zeph Wind, trickster*

**Storm Mar** (air/artisan) — Year 68

Another year. We are still here.

The dust never stops.
We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.

*— Storm Mar, artisan*

**Ora Flame** (fire/prophet) — Year 68

The fire in me stirs with possibility.

The dust never stops.
We found something. Maybe Mars is not trying to kill us.

*— Ora Flame, prophet*
